evals.expected_output: Downloads MP3 to ~/Music/dj/DnB/, renames to 'Sub Focus - Original Don (ft. Fireboy DML & Irah).mp3' or similar canonical form, writes ID3 tags with Artist='Sub Focus' and Title='Original Don', Genre='Drum & Bass'

evals.prompt: download the checked tracks from this week's discovery list
evals.expected_output: Reads the discovery note at 1 Projects/DJing/Weekly Discovery/2026-03-09.md, extracts only [x] checked items, downloads each track's YouTube URL, researches and renames each with canonical Artist - Title format, writes ID3 tags, deposits in ~/Music/dj/DnB/

files.description: Mock weekly discovery note with 4 tracks, 2 checked and 2 unchecked

evals.expected_output: Downloads MP3 to ~/Music/dj/To Sort/ (no genre specified), renames to 'Camo & Krooked & Mefjus - No Tomorrow (ft. Sophie Lindinger).mp3' or similar, strips '[Official Video]' cruft, writes ID3 tags. The challenge is parsing multiple artists joined by '&' and a featured vocalist from a messy YouTube title.
